role: Root configuration and state management directory for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively defines system settings (scanning, hooks, LLM providers), file extension language support, synchronization health and sync-state snapshots, architectural rule enforcement (layer isolation, documentation standards), and runtime execution records (pipeline stages, file processing, hook behavior) to enable mirroring and maintain architectural integrity.

children.role: Configuration for the ArchSpine system demo project, defining scanning, hook, and LLM provider settings.
Declares detected file extensions and available language support for the ArchSpine mirror system.

Health-check and sync-state snapshot for the ArchSpine mirror system. This file provides a quick, human-readable view of the last synchronization activity and system health metrics while the authoritative state resides in `.spine/cache.db`.
This directory contains the architectural rules and configuration for the ArchSpine project.
This directory stores execution records of synchronization runs for the ArchSpine mirror system.
